message:
feat(tests): add T5.11 exhaustive unit tests for web/middleware/gRPC contracts (52 tests)

Covers T5.2-T5.8 edge cases, error paths, and contract invariants:
- T5.2 Router contracts: wildcards, conflicts, empty paths, special chars (6 tests)
- T5.3 Extractor edge cases: missing content-type, malformed JSON, empty query (7 tests)
- T5.4 Middleware error handling: circuit breaker trip, bulkhead saturation,
  load shedding, retry idempotency, auth rejection (10 tests)
- T5.6 gRPC protocol: status code mapping, metadata key validation,
  codec invalid flags, oversized messages, partial frames (8 tests)
- T5.7 Production features: grpc-timeout parsing all 6 units, health service
  multi-service, watcher changes, interceptor error short-circuit,
  rate limiter reset, auth validator edge cases (12 tests)
- Coverage enforcement artifact (1 test)

Combined with T5.8 interop matrix: 118 tests across web/gRPC surface.
Closes T5.11 (asupersync-2oh2u.5.11).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
